objective: Extraire le niveau d'experience (seniority) depuis l'API FreeWork, le propager dans les types Mission et TJMRecord, et segmenter le radar marche TJM par seniority reelle plutot que par tiers statistiques

content: L'API FreeWork renvoie un champ experienceLevel (valeurs connues: 'senior', 'intermediate', 'junior') qui est actuellement ignore par le parser. Nous allons l'extraire et le mapper vers SeniorityLevel.
reason: Le champ existe deja dans les reponses API (confirme par les fixtures de test) mais n'est pas declare dans FreeWorkJobPosting ni extrait par parseFreeWorkAPI

content: Ajouter un champ optionnel 'seniority: SeniorityLevel | null' a Mission et TJMRecord. Le rendre optionnel permet la retrocompatibilite avec les connecteurs qui ne fournissent pas cette info.
reason: Seul FreeWork fournit experienceLevel pour l'instant. LeHibou et les autres connecteurs ne le fournissent pas, il faut donc que le champ soit nullable.

content: Remplacer sliceIntoThirds dans analyzeTJMHistory par un groupement reel par seniority quand les records ont le champ seniority. Fallback sur le split statistique quand aucun record n'a de seniority (retrocompatibilite).
reason: C'est le coeur du bug: les ranges junior/confirmed/senior sont actuellement des tiers statistiques fictifs au lieu d'etre bases sur des donnees reelles.

content: Mapper FreeWork experienceLevel: 'junior' -> 'junior', 'intermediate' -> 'confirmed', 'senior' -> 'senior'. Valeurs inconnues -> null.
reason: FreeWork utilise 'intermediate' tandis que notre type SeniorityLevel utilise 'confirmed'. Le mapping est fait dans le parser pur (Core).
Run 1 completed Mission+parser changes. Run 2 starts remaining 9 items: TJMRecord type, extractRecords, addRecords, analyzeTJMHistory, schemas, shell migration, tests, UI

content: Phase 2: Implement remaining TJM seniority changes. Core types (tjm.ts, schemas.ts), core logic (tjm-history/index.ts), shell migration (tjm-history.ts), and UI (TJMDashboard.svelte, TJMPage.svelte). See context.md for full plan.
Phase 2: Update test helpers (makeMission, makeRecord) to include seniority field. Add seniority-specific test cases for extractRecords, addRecords, analyzeTJMHistory.

Updated test helpers (makeMission, makeRecord) with seniority: null default. Added seniority: null to existing extractRecords assertion. Added 3 new extractRecords seniority tests, 2 new addRecords seniority tests, 4 new analyzeTJMHistory tests. All core functions tested as pure — no mocks.
reason: Task specifies TDD-style tests for Phase 2 seniority grouping in extractRecords, addRecords, and analyzeTJMHistory

content: TDD: 3 tests expected to fail until implementation is complete: (1) addRecords 'keeps records with different seniority separate' — requires upsert key change to stack:date:seniority. (2) analyzeTJMHistory 'uses real seniority grouping' — requires seniority-based grouping instead of sliceIntoThirds when records have seniority. (3) analyzeTJMHistory 'handles mixed seniority and null records gracefully' — requires null-seniority records to be excluded from seniority ranges. Also: src/dev/mocks.ts and tests/fixtures/large-dataset.ts are missing the new seniority and startDate fields on Mission, and seniority on TJMRecord.

Added seniority to TJMRecord, updated extractRecords to group by stack+seniority, updated addRecords upsert key to stack:date:seniority, replaced analyzeTJMHistory with real seniority grouping (fallback to sliceIntoThirds when no records have seniority).
reason: Core of the feature: TJM radar now segments by actual experience levels instead of statistical thirds

content: analyzeTJMHistory uses buildRangeForLevel with fallback chain: per-seniority averages, then unknown bucket, then all averages. This ensures graceful degradation when some seniority levels have no records.
reason: When a seniority level has no records (e.g. no junior missions scraped), we fall back to unknown/null-seniority data, then to all data, rather than showing empty ranges.

content: All 689 tests pass (44 files). The 3 previously failing tests (addRecords seniority separation, analyzeTJMHistory real grouping, mixed seniority) now pass. Also fixed pre-existing type error in type-guards.test.ts makeValidProfile (missing searchKeywords).

description: Line 45: Stray `});` is a syntax error — orphaned closing brace/paren after $effect block that already closed on line 44. Will cause Svelte compilation failure.

note: Fixed stray }); syntax error found by @validator

reason: verdict=APPROVED, 0 issues. typecheck clean, 689/689 tests pass.
